parameters.name: attrclass
parameters.label: Attribute Class
parameters.description: Makes the operate on point attributes, vertex attributes or primitive attributes where applicable.

parameters.name: group
parameters.label: Group
parameters.description: If there are input groups, specifying a group name in this field will cause this to act only upon the group specified.

parameters.name: chop
parameters.label: CHOP
parameters.description: The to use for lookups.

parameters.name: indexunit
parameters.label: Lookup Index Units
parameters.description: Units for lookup index attribute.

parameters.name: cyclic
parameters.label: Cyclic Index
parameters.description: When enabled, the index wraps so the end connects back to the start, letting the full range map evenly across the cycle.

parameters.name: interpolate
parameters.label: Interpolate
parameters.description: When on, the can be interpolated between samples. When off, the nearest sample is used.

parameters.name: extendleft
parameters.label: Extend Left and Right
parameters.description: What happens when the lookup samples outside of the range.

parameters.name: lookup
parameters.label: Lookup
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks of lookups.

parameters.name: lookup0chanscope
parameters.label: Channel Scope
parameters.description: Pattern of channel names to use to perform the lookup for the output attribute values.

parameters.name: lookup0fromlow
parameters.label: From Low
parameters.description: Reranges the value resulting from the lookup.

parameters.name: lookup0fromhigh
parameters.label: From High
parameters.description: Reranges the value resulting from the lookup.

parameters.name: lookup0tolow
parameters.label: To Low
parameters.description: Sets low value on the output range.

parameters.name: lookup0tohigh
parameters.label: To High
parameters.description: Reranges the output attribute value.

parameters.name: lookup0outputattrscope
parameters.label: Output Attribute Scope
parameters.description: Name of attribute to output (can choose components of attribute), can choose from menu.

parameters.name: lookup0overrideautoattr
parameters.label: Override Automatic Attribute
parameters.description: Whether to override the kind of attribute automatically created based on the input and parameters. Allows to specify manually the type and number of components of the new attribute.

parameters.name: lookup0attrtype
parameters.label: Attribute Type
parameters.description: The output attribute's data type, default float.

parameters.name: lookup0attrnumcomps
parameters.label: Components
parameters.description: The number of components in the new custom attribute.

parameters.name: bypass
parameters.label: Bypass
parameters.description: Pass through the first input to the output unchanged.

parameters.name: freeextragpumem
parameters.label: Free Extra GPU Memory
parameters.description: Free memory that has accumulated when output memory has grown and shrunk.

parameters.name: delinputattrs
parameters.label: Delete Input Attributes
parameters.description: Only output which attributes you specify in this helps isolate attributes into a separate branch.

parameters.name: lookup0attrdefaultval3
parameters.label: Lookup0Attrdefaultval3
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

examples.label: Configure lookupindexattr and Output Attribute Scope
examples.description: Common settings from 25 real Derivative examples
